integration.note: A Yjs persistence provider that stores/loads a Yjs CRDT document in a Solid pod. Yjs is the dominant CRDT powering collaborative editors (TipTap, BlockNote, Monaco-collab, Excalidraw, …); y-solid makes any Yjs app store its collaborative doc in the user's OWN pod. P1 = persistence: an append-only binary update-LOG (each Y update stored as application/octet-stream, merged on load) under a configured pod container, via an INJECTABLE authenticated fetch (the auth seam — never a concrete auth lib). Fail-closed scope guard (assertWithinBase) confines all writes to the container. Yjs is a peerDependency (not bundled). RDF discipline: the only RDF touched is the LDP container LISTING (read-only) via @jeswr/fetch-rdf parse + @solid/object ContainerDataset — never hand-built triples; the CRDT payload is binary, NOT RDF-encoded. Live cross-client sync (WebSocketChannel2023 / polling) is a DOCUMENTED seam, follow-up. GitHub-installable now (committed dist/, ignore-scripts=true); npm publish deferred, not a blocker.
